default_cluster_version.description: Version of Kubernetes the service deploys by default.

latest_master_version.description: The latest version available in the given zone for use with master instances.

latest_node_version.description: The latest version available in the given zone for use with node instances.

valid_master_versions.description: A list of versions available in the given zone for use with master instances.

valid_node_versions.description: A list of versions available in the given zone for use with node instances.
